text: I feel a curious blend of anticipation and displacement. The geometric clarity and neon aura of the room evoke a sense of modernity that is almost alien, yet inviting. Through the glass, I sense the barrier between observer and observed dissolving—my reflection mixing with the contents within, questioning my own place in this interplay of perception. The environment whispers of innovation but also watches me, reminding me that research and development are never purely external undertakings; they comment on human existence itself. I wonder: am I discovering, or being discovered by, this space?
